headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Ball, Lowers Price Target to $64
summary: UBS  analyst Joshua Spector   maintains Ball (NYSE:BALL) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $66 to $64.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Ball, Raises Price Target to $71
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Gabe Hajde   maintains Ball (NYSE:BALL) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $70 to $71.

headline: Ball Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Ball (NYSE:BALL) executives said the beverage packaging maker opened 2026 with what CEO Ron Lewis called “a good start,” citing modest global volume growth alongside stronger earnings and an outlook that maintains the company’s targets for the year.
